_meta.purpose: Founder-signed business judgment that NO source can derive: which NOT-NULL columns are server-set (so they are NOT user-validation rules) per entity+action. gen_rules compiles validation = derived(canonical) MINUS server_set. This is the ~5% authored layer; everything else is derived.

create.source: BRD:WF-010 — a school raises a ticket with subject + description only; category_id is resolved server-side (default active category), ticket_source is fixed to 'school', priority defaults to medium, school_id comes from the authenticated actor (never the browser).
